mapper.sql: id, title, icon, space, parent_id, format, file_type, content, sort_order, status, creator_id, creator_name, create_time, update_time
mapper.update:
UPDATE wiki_doc_content
title = #{title},
icon = #{icon},
parent_id = #{parentId},
content = #{content},
sort_order = #{sortOrder},
update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM wiki_doc_content WHERE space = #{space} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time ASC

WITH RECURSIVE breadcrumb AS ( SELECT id, title, parent_id, 1 AS level FROM wiki_doc_content WHERE id = #{id} UNION ALL SELECT t.id, t.title, t.parent_id, b.level + 1 FROM wiki_doc_content t INNER JOIN breadcrumb b ON t.id = b.parent_id ) SELECT id AS key, title AS label FROM breadcrumb ORDER BY level DESC
